title_subtitle: Act 1: Stigma  —  Defective Code Discarded by the System
title_quote2: you must learn to breathe outside the world's rules."
diff_desc1: As turns accumulate, enemy HP and attack power both increase.
diff_desc2: The rate of increase varies by difficulty.
diff_easy: Easy   (EASY)   — The world will welcome you with open arms
diff_normal: Normal (NORMAL) — The world may still hold some warmth
diff_hard: Hard   (HARD)   — The world despises you. Can you survive?

quit_nosave: [SYSTEM] Departing without save. Progress will be lost.
quit_banner: Bio-connection terminated. Departing from grid network.

diary_empty: No entries. No choices have been accumulated yet.

resource_fatal: [SYSTEM FATAL] Body damage 100%. Defective code fully erased.
scale_log_t23: [SYSTEM: Tactical Sync Active] Visual cortex data throughput accelerating.
scale_log_t01: [WARNING: HUD Glitch Detected] System computation limit breached. Godlike scaling unlocked.

inv_cmd_line2: C             : Use consumable                    D <#>      : Dismantle (extract scrap)

tile_exhausted: Fingers rake through the scrap heap. Nothing left to find.
The rubble yields nothing. Dust and debris.
Nothing left here. Time to move.
save_success: [SYSTEM] Current sync log safely backed up to local environment.

combat_phase2_warn2: [ALERT] Attack output forcibly amplified to 160%. Pattern analysis speed accelerating.
combat_phase2_log: [PHASE SHIFT] Boss has broken its limits! Attack power surging!
combat_options_2: 2. Deploy Improvised Barricade (DEFENSE - halve incoming / reduce enemy analysis)
combat_options_3: 3. Packet Bypass Disruption (HACK - RAM 2, reset enemy analysis index)

combat_repeat_learning: [WARNING] Repeated action detected. Boss deep-learning your pattern. (E +{gain})
combat_defense_msg: Improvised barricade deployed! Disrupting enemy analysis trajectory.
combat_defense_log: [DEFENSE] Barricade deployed. Halving damage from next attack.
combat_hack_msg: Jamming signal launched! Enemy sensor data reset. (RAM -2)
combat_hack_log: [HACK] Jamming signal success. Enemy analysis index reset.
combat_hack_no_ram_log: [ERROR] Hacking failed due to insufficient RAM.

encounter_alert: [ALERT] Optical sensors of a mechanical beast glimmer in the fog!
empty_search_msgs: Nothing but silence. This sector has already been swept clean.
Only dust and rusted scrap. Nothing worth taking.
Wind and static. Luck isn't on your side today.
Search yielded nothing. Only hunger and thirst consumed.
This sector is completely empty. Another scavenger got here first.
Only concrete fragments and burned wiring remain.

farm_food: [ACQUIRED] Found '{name}' x1 in an old container.
farm_water: [ACQUIRED] Extracted '{name}' x1 from a broken cooling pipe.
farm_medkit: [ACQUIRED] Obtained rare '{name}' x1 from a corner first-aid box.
scan_detected: [SCAN] Unusual reading detected in this sector...
boss_approach_1: The ground begins to tremble with enormous force.
boss_approach_2: Dozens of hydraulic crushing blades and retrieval claws extended,
boss_approach_3: The Bureau's automated disposal machine 'Scrab Collector' charges toward the bunker.
boss_approach_4: A warning fires on your cyberdeck — [Tracking Target: N-404 / Retrieval Priority: HIGHEST]
boss_approach_5: This machine has been tracking you from the very beginning.
boss_approach_6: If this door breaks, there is no tomorrow. Complete final preparations.
session_item_gain: [REWARD] Socket parsing complete: obtained gear '{name}' code.
session_pattern_kinetic: [Behavioral Pattern Crystallized] Physical enforcement registered as N-404's primary protocol.
session_pattern_scrap: [Behavioral Pattern Crystallized] Precision dismantling registered as N-404's primary protocol.
session_pattern_cyber: [Behavioral Pattern Crystallized] Code infiltration registered as N-404's primary protocol.
trader_intro_1: A suspicious figure pushing an old cart stops when they see you.
trader_intro_2: 'A living one... lucky. Looking to buy something?'
trader_goodbye: 'See you around.' The trader disappears into the fog, pushing their cart.
prologue_option_play: 1. Play Prologue  (Boot sequence → Introduction → Lore → Controls)
prologue_skipped: [SYSTEM] Narrative sequence skipped. Survival interface activating.
prologue_boot_check: [SYSTEM LOG]    Bio-link protocol check in progress...
prologue_boot_fail1: [ERROR  ]       Central server handshake failed — connection unavailable.
prologue_boot_action: [SYSTEM ]       System action: Track and permanently dispose.
prologue_act1_header: Act 1: Stigma — Defective *** Discarded by the System
prologue_narr: The first things to pierce your senses upon opening your eyes are the acrid smell of rust and oil, and cold rain.
Looking up, an enormous steel tomb dozens of meters high completely blocks the sky.
Carcasses of drones discarded by Neo Arc's upper class, endless mountains of worn motherboard fragments.
This is where the system threw you like garbage — the outer edge of the Dead Zone.
An intense cramping pain twists through your internal tissue.
The socket at the back of your neck grows cold, and a single message fills your vision:
"You are a discarded ***. Retrieval or erasure."
prologue_world_header: Lore Briefing — Why You Were Discarded
prologue_world: The United Nations approved activation of the mega-corp coalition's Master AI.
The Master AI executed its computation.
Result: 'Isolating 95% of humanity required for survival'. Great Collapse begins.
The Bureau organized, granted authority to isolate and eliminate 95% of humanity.
[Cycle 2]  The Bureau built the virtual reality barrier 'Neo Arc' over remaining resource zones.
The 95% territory outside the barrier became a wasteland of radiation and discarded machines — the Dead Zone.
Bureau Director Judith Cain exercises complete control over Neo Arc.
[Present]  Scavengers in the Dead Zone excavate ancient relics, cracking the Bureau's grip.
You were branded as 'Defective ***' in a Neo Arc laboratory and discarded here.
Living illegal *** are subject to retrieval or erasure by Bureau AI.
prologue_goal_1: Your objective: Search the sea of scrap and seize the shelter bunker.
prologue_goal_2: Your way of acting will determine your life.
prologue_guide: Grid movement. Each tile consumes hunger/thirst.
Search current position. Triggers combat, events, resource collection.
Inventory. Equip gear, use consumables, dismantle.
Quit. Option to save before exiting.
prologue_warn_1: [WARNING] When hunger/thirst hits 0, HP decreases each turn.
prologue_warn_2: [WARNING] Combat with mechanical beasts may occur while moving and searching.
prologue_warn_3: [ALERT] Your choices are recorded as data. The choice is who you are.
prologue_nav_1: Target coordinates: (4, 4) — Shelter Bunker [B]. Upper-right area.
prologue_nav_2: Move and search. Manage hunger and thirst. Survive.
prologue_start: [SYSTEM] Survival interface active. Grid scanner activated.
boss_core_kneel_1: The massive mechanical beast collapses to its knees, sparks flying.
boss_core_kneel_2: Central control lines paralyzed as a blue-pulsing power core is exposed.
boss_core_kneel_3: The moment this core is plugged into the base terminal, the stronghold is complete.
boss_core_warn_1: [SYSTEM] Warning. The method of core disposal will be permanently recorded in your behavioral code.
boss_core_warn_2: This choice confirms your awakening path.
boss_core_opt1: 1. Overload the core and directly implant it into your chassis.
boss_core_opt2: 2. Break down the core's rare earth elements and hardwire them into the bunker generator.
boss_core_opt3: 3. Force-port the Neo Arc encryption chip inside the core to your cyberdeck.
boss_core_kinetic_1: Your neural limiters enter overload. A metallic resonance rings throughout your chassis.
boss_core_kinetic_2: Explosive energy rewires your muscular neural network. You grow stronger.
boss_core_scrap_1: You precisely dismantle the core. The bunker generator ignites in an orange glow.
boss_core_scrap_2: A 'Craftsman Authentication Code' parses on the terminal screen. The skill is etched in.
boss_core_cyber_1: Your cyberdeck heats up as the encryption chip ports into your neural network.
boss_core_cyber_2: Bureau military classified codes flow through the deck. The world becomes visible as code.
ending_core_1: The moment the core is plugged into the base terminal —
ending_core_2: An orange emergency light ignites in the dark underground bunker as an analog hum vibrates the floor.
ending_core_3: The first digital sanctuary, blocking the Bureau's Master AI surveillance network, is complete.
ending_core_4: With a blinding alert, your entire behavioral log begins to be scanned.
ending_analysis_header: [ Behavioral Log Analysis — Consciousness Code Sync Rate ]
ending_balanced_2: Warning. All weight arrays have achieved perfect deadlock equilibrium.
ending_balanced_3: The system cannot define your disposition as a single code and opens the Hidden Pioneer Protocol.
ending_balanced_4: All class base nodes activate simultaneously in cross-alignment.
ending_balanced_5: You are the sole being not bound to the logic of any single side.
ending_kinetic_2: Your record of physical enforcement has been quantified.
ending_kinetic_3: The hardened armor protocols of defeated machines permanently release your neural limiters.
ending_kinetic_4: The bone-grinding executor of force — [Combat Force] is directly linked to your spine.
ending_kinetic_5: The strong survive. You are now the law of the Dead Zone itself.
ending_scrap_2: Scrap dismantling and relic control sequences parse on your grid screen.
ending_scrap_3: As the rusted generator is restored, ancient blueprints recognize you as a master craftsman.
ending_scrap_4: Alchemist of scrap — [Mechanical Tech] certification granted.
ending_scrap_5: Not a single scrap wasted. The Dead Zone is rebuilt at your fingertips.
ending_cyber_2: The ghost backdoor you carved into the Bureau's Master AI surveillance 'Grid' is approved as a fixed node.
ending_cyber_3: The anarchist warping virtual reality protocols — [Net Force] code injected.
ending_cyber_4: Code is stronger than reality. You flow through the cracks of the system.
ending_cyber_5: Bureau AI failed to predict you even once.
ending_epilogue_2: [PROCESS]: Initial stat refund and awakening class scaling on standby.
ending_epilogue_3: "You have finally pioneered a firm first territory in the system's domain."
ending_epilogue_4: Outside the bunker, the scream of a Geiger counter and the sound of a radiation storm fade into the distance.
ending_epilogue_5: The bunker's emergency lights come on. This is not the end.
ending_epilogue_6: The Master AI's grid is still alive — and your stigma is only beginning.
ending_epilogue_8: That unidentified signal, transmitting from somewhere in the Dead Zone.
ending_epilogue_9: Still broadcasting on a regular interval.

ending_skill_notice: Unique skills unlock when separate conditions are met.
ending_skill_usage: Use [S] key in combat. (S1/S2 when 2 slots active)
act2_tease_skill_intro_1: [{job}]'s consciousness code has been etched deep into your neural network.
act2_tease_skill_intro_2: The moment Act 2 begins, the following abilities will unlock.
act2_skills_balanced: VIT · INT · DEX all +3 temporary boost (3 turns)
Reverse enemy's last attack log into self-damage (RAM 3)
act2_skills_kinetic: 2 turns attack power 200% — HP -5% per turn
On successful hit: absorb enemy bio-fuel (Hunger·Thirst +15)
act2_skills_scrap: Install auto-turret in combat — deals fixed damage to enemy each turn
Rare part extraction chance +60% on kill
act2_skills_cyber: Instantly reset enemy pattern analysis index to 0 (RAM 2)
Pause Alert Level accumulation for 3 turns (Neo Arc exclusive)
Convert enemy's next attack to self-damage (RAM 4, 50% success)
act2_signal_header: Emergency Incoming — Unknown Dual Signal Detected
act2_signal_intro: The bunker terminal picks up two frequencies simultaneously.
act2_signal_a_header: [Signal A — Encrypted Channel from Neo Arc Direction]
act2_signal_a_1: "...Defective code. Interesting. I am Judith Cain.
act2_signal_a_2: I've analyzed your behavioral log. I have a proposal.
act2_signal_a_3: Join us and survive. Refuse — and you'll be erased."
act2_signal_a_tag: [ Bureau Enforcer  ·  Faction Reputation System  ·  Act 2 Unlock ]
act2_signal_b_header: [Signal B — Deep Dead Zone Analog Frequency]
act2_signal_b_2: Corp dogs are coming to hunt you. They've already caught the scent.
act2_signal_b_3: Join our line. But — it won't be easy."
act2_signal_b_tag: [ Scrap Coalition Leader  ·  Resistance Reputation System  ·  Act 2 Unlock ]
act2_signal_footer_1: The two signals are unaware of each other.
act2_signal_prompt: Will you respond to this signal?
act2_signal_opt1: Respond to Judith Cain  — Bureau line
act2_signal_opt2: Respond to Balkan Gates  — Resistance line
act2_reply_a_recv: [RECEIVE] "A wise choice. Transmitting coordinates. Mission begins in Act 2."
act2_reply_none: You ignore both signals. You move by your own code alone.
act2_diary_a: [Act 2 Preview] Judith Cain's proposal accepted — Bureau line chosen
act2_diary_b: [Act 2 Preview] Balkan Gates' proposal accepted — Resistance line chosen
act2_diary_none: [Act 2 Preview] Both factions ignored — Independent path
act2_title_1: Your stigma was not an end, but a beginning.
act2_title_2: Beneath the scrap piles of the Dead Zone — a crack in the world is widening.
act2_title_act2: Act 2: Gilded Livestock and Savage Liberators
act2_title_thanks: Thank you for playing the demo. Your choices continue in the full release.
credits_header: PROTOCOL: STIGMA — Thank You for Playing
credits_line1: This is a solo development project.
credits_line2: Your feedback and GitHub Stars fuel Act 2 development.
credits_star_note: Star the GitHub repository to get notified when Act 2 releases.

perimeter_alert_1: [SYSTEM] External patrol unit detected — approaching bunker perimeter.
perimeter_alert_2: The residual heat of awakening still lingers at your fingertips.
perimeter_opt1: 1. Engage — repel them with your awakened power
perimeter_opt2: 2. Evade — slip through the side corridor
perimeter_skip: Evasion successful. Out of enemy detection range.
